message.content:
I need to understand the project structure for building a new screen (Emoji Picker). Please:

1. Read src/components/clipboard_history/clipboard_history_view.tsx to understand the pattern for full-screen views
2. Read src/data/clipboard_data.ts to understand mock data patterns  
3. Read src/App.tsx to understand how screens are wired in
4. Read src/components/grid/grid.tsx and grid_item.tsx to understand Grid component API
5. Read src/types.ts for existing types
6. Check what's in src/components/icons/index.ts for available icons

Provide a summary of:
- How full-screen views are structured (state management, SearchBar, List/Grid, ActionPanel, keyboard shortcuts)
- How mock data files are structured
- How App.tsx wires navigation to push views
- Grid component API (props, keyboard nav, columns)
- Available icon components
- Key patterns to follow

content.text: I'll systematically read through these files to understand the project structure and patterns for building the Emoji Picker screen.
